hero.sub: Discover projects. Choose a cause. Donate directly.

trust.text: Every dollar donated goes directly to researchers in the field — no middlemen, no bureaucracy.

steps.title: Organizations register their projects
steps.text: NGOs, conservation associations and environmental entities from any country publish projects, goals and results directly on the platform. No middlemen, no editorial filter.
steps.detail: Identity and credential verification within 5 business days.

steps.title: You discover and follow the work
steps.text: The feed shows real updates — field photos, milestones reached, new species records. Each project has an ongoing story.
steps.detail: Notifications when a project you support publishes news.

steps.title: Your donation has a name and address
steps.text: You choose the project, see exactly what you're funding, and receive updates over time. Visible impact, not abstract.
steps.detail: 100% of your donation goes to the project. Platform fee covered by sponsors.

cta.headline: Amazing projects happen every day in remote places. With any amount,
cta.headlineEm: you become part of the story.
cta.footnote: Donations from $2 · Cancel anytime · 100% goes to the project

projetos.title: All
projetos.subtitle: Filter by biome, species or country to find the cause that speaks to you.
projetos.noResults: No projects found for this filter.

entrar.title: Sign in or
entrar.subtitle: Use your email — we send a magic link. No password.
entrar.sentDesc: Check {email} and click the link to sign in.
entrar.orgLink: Are you an organization? Register your project →
entrar.terms: By signing in, you agree to our terms of use. Your account is free forever.

comoFunciona.title: A platform for
comoFunciona.subtitle: Fauna connects conservation organizations to supporters worldwide — with full transparency, zero fees and direct updates from the field.
comoFunciona.feedSub: Registered organizations publish updates directly on the platform. Supporters follow the work in real time and receive notifications with every new post.
comoFunciona.zeroSub: Every cent donated goes directly to the project. The platform is sustained through voluntary contributions from supporters.

donorSteps.title: Explore the projects
donorSteps.text: Browse conservation projects from around the world. Filter by biome, species, country or cause. Each project has a story, goals and real results.

donorSteps.title: Choose what matters to you
donorSteps.text: You decide where your money goes. See exactly what each project does, who leads it and how much has been raised before supporting.

donorSteps.title: Track impact in real time
donorSteps.text: Organizations publish updates directly on the platform — photos, videos, field reports. You receive notifications and become part of the story.

orgSteps.title: Create your organization profile
orgSteps.text: Simple and free registration. Fill in your NGO or association details, add your mission and choose your areas of work.
orgSteps.detail: Identity and credential verification within 5 business days.

orgSteps.title: Publish your projects
orgSteps.text: Create full pages for each project — fundraising goals, description of work, species involved and location.
orgSteps.detail: No editorial curation. Any legitimate conservation project is welcome.

orgSteps.title: Post updates and connect with supporters
orgSteps.text: Post photos, videos, stories and field reports directly on the platform. Your supporters receive every update and stay engaged with your work.
orgSteps.detail: 100% of the donation goes to the project. Platform fee covered by sponsors.

contentTypes.label: Photos
contentTypes.desc: Field images, recorded species, teams in action

contentTypes.label: Stories
contentTypes.desc: Quick updates and day-to-day project moments

contentTypes.label: Reports
contentTypes.desc: Texts from researchers telling what's happening

donorProfile.noDonations: You haven't made any donations yet

orgDash.pendingVerification: Your organization is under review. An administrator will verify your profile shortly. You can already create projects.
orgDash.profileSubtitle: Public information displayed on the platform.
orgDash.newProjectSub: Fill in the conservation project details.
orgDash.newUpdateSub: Share field news with your supporters.
orgDash.contentPh: Share what happened, data collected, impact...

apoie.missionSub: Fauna is a non-profit platform built by people who believe the biodiversity crisis is the greatest challenge of our generation — and that well-made technology can be part of the solution.
apoie.finP1: When you donate $20 to a conservation project on Fauna, $20 reaches the organization responsible for that project. There is no platform fee, no intermediary taking a cut.
apoie.finP2: To keep the platform running — servers, development, organization verification, support — we depend on supporters who believe in the mission and contribute directly to Fauna.

values.title: Full transparency
values.desc: 100% of donations go directly to the projects. Fauna does not retain a single cent from conservation supporters' contributions.

values.title: Verified impact
values.desc: All organizations on the platform undergo manual verification before publishing projects. Only legitimate causes reach you.

values.title: Global access
values.desc: A project in the Pantanal can receive support from someone in Norway. We remove the bureaucratic and currency barriers that isolate conservation.

values.title: Technology as a tool
values.desc: We build digital infrastructure that conservation organizations — usually small and without IT resources — could not build on their own.

apoie.tiersSub: By supporting Fauna monthly, you ensure the infrastructure keeps running and more conservation projects can reach more donors.
apoie.corpNote: Prefer a one-time contribution or want to discuss corporate sponsorship?
apoie.footerSub: Each platform supporter multiplies the impact of dozens of conservation projects around the world.
